trade-execution paths (open/close/increase/decrease/execute). The external
Pyth account is not delegated to the ER — it is only a validator-maintained
clone — so accepting it here would let a permissionless liquidation price
the position from a source that diverges from the one it was opened/valued
against.

errors.name: MultisigAccountNotAuthorized
errors.msg: Account is not authorized to sign this instruction

errors.name: MultisigAlreadySigned
errors.msg: Account has already signed this instruction

errors.name: MultisigAlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: This instruction has already been executed

errors.name: InvalidEnvironment
errors.msg: Instruction is not allowed in production

errors.name: InstructionNotAllowed
errors.msg: Instruction is not allowed at this time

errors.name: PermissionlessOracleMissingSignature
errors.msg: Permissionless oracle update must be preceded by Ed25519 signature verification instruction

errors.name: PermissionlessOracleMalformedEd25519Data
errors.msg: Ed25519 signature verification data does not match expected format

errors.name: PermissionlessOracleSignerMismatch
errors.msg: Ed25519 signature was not signed by the oracle authority

errors.name: PermissionlessOracleMessageMismatch
errors.msg: Signed message does not match instruction params

errors.name: InvalidOwner
errors.msg: Owner of Token Account does not match

errors.name: InvalidAccess
errors.msg: Only nft holders or referred users can trade

errors.name: TokenStakeAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Token Stake account doesnot match referral account

errors.name: ExposureLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Max exposure limit exceeded for the market

errors.name: LpPriceOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Liquidity Token price is out of bounds

errors.name: OraclePenaltyAlreadySet
errors.msg: Oracle penalty already set on this position

errors.name: ReceiptMismatch
errors.msg: Receipt fields do not match the provided pool/custody

errors.name: ReceiptNotProcessed
errors.msg: Receipt has not been processed yet

errors.name: MigrationLpMintMismatch
errors.msg: LP mint does not match the pool's lp_mint

errors.name: PoolLpSupplyAlreadyMigrated
errors.msg: Pool lp_supply has already been migrated

errors.name: InsufficientAumAccounts
errors.msg: Not enough AUM accounts forwarded to queue the post-delegation action

fields.name: queue_er_action
docs: `true`  → queue `_er` as a post-delegation action in this same base tx
(forwards the full AUM account set in `remaining_accounts`).
`false` → delegate the receipt with NO action; a keeper calls
`add_compounding_liquidity_er` on the ER in a separate tx. Use
when the AUM set would push the base tx past the 64-account
limit. See the client-side account count.

fields.name: ratios
docs: New ratios after this custody is added. Must have length
`pool.ratios.len() + 1`, matching the invariant in `add_custody`.

fields.name: queue_er_action
docs: `true`  → queue `_er` as a post-delegation action in this same base tx
(forwards the full AUM account set in `remaining_accounts`).
`false` → delegate the receipt with NO action; a keeper calls
`add_liquidity_and_stake_er` on the ER in a separate tx. Use
when the AUM set would push the base tx past the 64-account
limit. See the client-side account count.

types.name: BasketLedgerErLog
docs: Emitted by the ER trade instructions whenever funds move between a user's
tradeable basket balance and an open trade: collateral/reserve pulled out of
the basket into a trade (`debit_amount`), or a settlement/payout returned to
the basket out of a trade (`credit_amount`). Exactly one side is non-zero.
Complements the base-chain `DepositDirectBaseLog` / `WithdrawalSettleBaseLog`
(which track the `user_deposit_ledger`): together they let a consumer follow
the full lifecycle deposit → basket → trade → basket → withdrawal.

fields.name: debit_amount
docs: Amount debited from the basket into a trade (collateral / reserve in).

fields.name: credit_amount
docs: Amount credited back to the basket from a trade (settlement / payout out).

fields.name: op_type
docs: Source instruction — maps to `BasketLedgerErType`.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER step runs, 1 after.

types.name: CollectRevenueReceipt
docs: Receipt for the user-initiated `collect_revenue` ER flow. Created on
base chain by `collect_revenue_with_action`, delegated to the ER, filled
with the computed revenue amount, then undelegated for settlement.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER step runs, 1 after.

types.name: CollectStakeRewardReceipt
docs: Receipt for the user-initiated `collect_stake_reward` flow. Created on
mainnet by `collect_stake_reward_with_action`, delegated to the ER. The
ER inlines a refresh (credits `flp_stake.unclaimed_rewards`), reads
the credit into `claim_amount`, zeros `flp_stake.unclaimed_rewards`,
writes `claim_amount` + `processed = 1` here. After commit_and_undelegate
lands on mainnet, the `collect_stake_reward_settle` post-undelegate
action transfers `claim_amount` USDC from the fee custody vault to the
user. If the action fails, ops re-submits via SDK using the durable
receipt.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER refresh step runs, 1 after — gates the transfer /
settle handler.

types.name: CollectTokenRewardReceipt
docs: Carries a token-reward claim across the ER split flow:
base `collect_token_reward_with_action` (creates + delegates the receipt and
queues `_er`) → ER `collect_token_reward_er` (reads `token_stake.reward_tokens`
into `amount`, zeros it, bumps `token_vault.reward_tokens_paid`) →
`commit_and_undelegate` → base `collect_token_reward_settle` (transfers
`amount` FAF from the vault token account to the user, closes the receipt).
If `amount == 0` the settle just closes (nothing to pay).

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER credit step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler.

types.name: CompoundFeesReceipt
docs: Receipt for the keeper-initiated `compound_fees` flow. Created on
mainnet by `compound_fees_with_action`, delegated to the ER. The ER
reads the receipt, computes `reward_amount` + `reward_lp_to_mint`, and
writes them back along with `processed = 1`. After commit_and_undelegate
lands on mainnet, the `compound_fees_settle` post-undelegate action reads
these fields and mints the LP. If the action fails to fire, ops
re-submits via SDK using the durable receipt.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER pricing step runs, 1 after — gates the mint /
settle handler.

fields.name: queue_er_action
docs: `true`  → queue `_er` as a post-delegation action in this same base tx
(forwards the full AUM account set in `remaining_accounts`).
`false` → delegate the receipt with NO action; a keeper calls
`compound_fees_er` on the ER in a separate tx. Use when the AUM
set would push the base tx past the 64-account limit.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER pricing/slippage step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler
and prevents reentrant ER calls.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER pricing/slippage step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler
and prevents reentrant ER calls.

fields.name: output_amount
docs: Amount credited to the owner's basket (in `output_custody_uid` token) for
this partial close — the settled payout, mirroring close_position_er.

fields.name: funding_lamports
docs: Lamports to top the vault up with before delegating. Pass 0 to skip.

fields.name: output_custody_uid
docs: Custody (token) the `output_amount` was credited to the basket in.

fields.name: uid
docs: Custody UID assigned by the caller (must equal the pool's next
`unique_custody_count`). We can't read Pool here, so the admin
supplies it and the companion `add_custody_er` verifies it.

fields.name: target_custody_mint
docs: Mint of the target custody — used to derive its PDA seed check.

fields.name: collateral_custody_mint
docs: Mint of the collateral custody — used to derive its PDA seed check.

fields.name: funding_lamports
docs: Lamports to transfer from admin into the vault on top of the
rent-exempt minimum. 0 is allowed but leaves no headroom for reallocs.

fields.name: compounding_token_amount
docs: sFLP / compounding-token amount the user is burning (locked upfront in entry).

fields.name: lp_amount_out
docs: LP redeemed from the burnt compounding tokens, transferred from
compounding → staked vault on settle (ER-filled).

fields.name: reward_lp_amount
docs: LP minted as pool-side compounding reward (ER-filled).

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER pricing/slippage step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler.
`lp_amount_out > 0` ⇒ settle success branch; `== 0` ⇒ settle failure (refund) branch.

fields.name: queue_er_action
docs: `true`  → queue `_er` as a post-delegation action in this same base tx
(forwards the full AUM account set in `remaining_accounts`).
`false` → delegate the receipt with NO action; a keeper calls
`migrate_flp_er` on the ER in a separate tx. Use when the AUM
set would push the base tx past the 64-account limit. See the
client-side account count.

fields.name: amount
docs: LP amount the user is migrating from staked → compounding.

fields.name: compounding_amount_out
docs: sFLP / compounding-token amount minted to the user (ER-filled).

fields.name: pool_reward_lp_amount
docs: LP minted as pool-side compounding reward (ER-filled).

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER pricing/slippage step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler.
`compounding_amount_out > 0` ⇒ settle success branch; `== 0` ⇒ settle failure (refund) branch.

fields.name: queue_er_action
docs: `true`  → queue `_er` as a post-delegation action in this same base tx
(forwards the full AUM account set in `remaining_accounts`).
`false` → delegate the receipt with NO action; a keeper calls
`migrate_stake_er` on the ER in a separate tx. Use when the AUM
set would push the base tx past the 64-account limit.

types.name: MoveProtocolFeesReceipt
docs: Receipt for the keeper-initiated `move_protocol_fees` flow. Created on
mainnet by `move_protocol_fees_with_action`, delegated to the ER. The ER
reads `reward_custody.fees_stats.protocol_fee`, splits it using the
snapshotted `fee_share_bps`, writes `revenue_amount` + `protocol_fee_amount`
back along with `processed = 1`, and mutates `reward_custody` (zeros
protocol_fee, bumps fees_stats.paid). After commit_and_undelegate lands on
mainnet, `move_protocol_fees_settle` does the SPL transfers and updates
`token_vault` / `protocol_vault`.

fields.name: reward_custody_token_account
docs: Snapshotted at entry so settle binds the SPL source to the exact
reward custody token account the receipt was created against —
prevents an attacker from passing a different custody token account
that happens to share the same mint.

fields.name: revenue_amount
docs: ER-filled. Transferred reward_custody_token_account → revenue_token_account.

fields.name: protocol_fee_amount
docs: ER-filled. Transferred reward_custody_token_account → protocol_token_account.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER step runs, 1 after.

fields.name: lp_supply
docs: Tracked LP token supply for accurate calculations during concurrent ER ops.
Updated atomically with `equity_usd` whenever LP is minted/burnt — by either
the ER side of the split flow or any mainnet non-ER liquidity ix. Reads on
the ER use this field instead of `lp_token_mint.supply`, which would be
stale across in-flight deposits / burns.

fields.name: output_custody_uid
docs: Custody (token) the `receive_amount` was credited to the basket in.

fields.name: queue_er_action
docs: `true`  → queue `_er` as a post-delegation action in this same base tx
(forwards the full AUM account set in `remaining_accounts`).
`false` → delegate the receipt with NO action; a keeper calls
`remove_compounding_liquidity_er` on the ER in a separate tx.
Use when the AUM set would push the base tx past the 64-account
limit. See the client-side account count.

fields.name: unstake_amount
docs: LP amount to unstake + redeem. ER caps this at
`flp_stake.stake_stats.active_amount` after the inline-refresh
pending→active promotion.

fields.name: queue_er_action
docs: `true`  → queue `_er` as a post-delegation action in this same base tx
(forwards the full AUM account set in `remaining_accounts`).
`false` → delegate the receipt with NO action; a keeper calls
`remove_liquidity_er` on the ER in a separate tx. Use
when the AUM set would push the base tx past the 64-account
limit. See the client-side account count.

types.name: SettleRebatesReceipt
docs: Receipt for the keeper-initiated `settle_rebates` flow. Created on
mainnet by `settle_rebates_with_action`, delegated to the ER. The ER fetches
the reward oracle, computes `rebate_amount` capped at min(obligation,
available reward custody balance), mutates `pool.rebate_obligation_usd`
+ `reward_custody.assets.owned`, writes `rebate_amount` + `rebate_usd` back
along with `processed = 1`. After commit_and_undelegate lands on mainnet,
`settle_rebates_settle` does the SPL transfer and updates `rebate_vault`.

fields.name: rebate_amount
docs: ER-filled. Transferred reward_custody_token_account → rebate_token_account.

fields.name: rebate_usd
docs: ER-filled. Settled portion of pool.rebate_obligation_usd; added to
rebate_vault.available_usd.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER step runs, 1 after.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER pricing/slippage step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER pricing/slippage step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler
and prevents reentrant ER calls.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER pricing/slippage step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler.
`amount_out > 0` ⇒ settle success branch; `amount_out == 0` ⇒ settle failure (refund) branch.

fields.name: queue_er_action
docs: `true`  → queue `_er` as a post-delegation action in this same base tx
(forwards the full AUM account set in `remaining_accounts`).
`false` → delegate the receipt with NO action; a keeper calls
`swap_er` on the ER in a separate tx. Use when the AUM set
would push the base tx past the 64-account limit. See the
client-side account count.

types.name: TokenStakeDepositReceipt
docs: Carries a token-stake deposit across the ER split flow:
base `deposit_token_stake_with_action` (funds staged into the vault token
account + receipt created/delegated) → ER `deposit_token_stake_er` (credits
the delegated `token_vault` + `token_stake`) → base `deposit_token_stake_settle`
(closes the receipt after credit or refund).

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER credit step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler.

fields.name: credited
docs: 1 → ER credited the stake; 0 → ER rejected (e.g. deposits disabled in
the delegation window). `_settle` closes either way.

fields.name: withdraw_request_id
docs: Index into `token_stake.withdraw_request` to settle. Set on base, read on ER.

fields.name: processed
docs: 0 before the ER step runs, 1 after — gates the settle handler.
